chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 324 - وَقَالَ أَبُو اَلْحَسَنِ مُوسَى بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «ثَلاَثٌ مَنْ عَرَفَهُنَّ لَمْ يَدَعْهُنَّ جَزُّ اَلشَّعْرِ وَ تَشْمِيرُ اَلثَّوْبِ وَ نِكَاحُ اَلْإِمَاءِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.324 - Abu al-Hasan Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as) said:
"There are three things which, if a person understands them, they will not abandon: trimming the hair, shortening the garment, and marrying bondwomen."
